summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdvantEdge360 v3 enhancements. Fixed 1 critical bug (duplicate code in ProjectDetailPage.js causing parsing error). All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: view toggle (tile/list), proposal versioning, timer start/stop, subtasks, comment edit/delete, reviewer actions (Approve & Continue, Return to Owner).

design_issues.issue: HTML hydration warning - <tr> cannot be child of <span>. Caused by dynamic content wrapper. Minor cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: CRITICAL: Duplicate orphaned code block from refactored fetchData function causing 'Parsing error: Unexpected token (165:6)'
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Removed duplicate code block (axios.get calls and their handlers that were already in fetchData function)

backend: Auth /api/auth/me - returns user with role
Proposal versioning - create proposal starts at v1
Proposal versioning - update creates version history
GET /api/proposals/{id}/versions - returns version history
POST /api/proposals/{id}/restore-version/{num} - restores old version
Timer - GET /api/timer/active returns no active timer initially
Timer - POST /api/timer/start starts timer for task
Timer - GET /api/timer/active shows running timer with elapsed time
Timer - Cannot start second timer when one is active (400)
Timer - POST /api/timer/stop stops timer and creates time log
Timer - Time logged to task.total_tracked_time
Timer - DELETE /api/timer/cancel cancels without logging
Comments - POST /api/tasks/{id}/add-comment adds comment with ID
Comments - PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/comments/{cid} edits comment
Comments - DELETE /api/tasks/{id}/comments/{cid} deletes comment
Subtasks - Create task with parent_task_id
Subtasks - Parent task subtasks array updated
Subtasks - GET /api/tasks/{id} includes subtask_details
Review - POST /api/tasks/{id}/send-for-review changes status to under_review
Review - POST /api/tasks/{id}/return-to-owner changes status back to in_progress with notes
View toggle - Proposals list has version field
View toggle - Projects list has completion_percentage
frontend: Proposals page - tile/list view toggle works
Proposals page - list view has sortable columns (Title, Client, Status, Amount)
Proposals page - list view shows version column
Proposal detail - History button opens version history dialog
Proposal detail - Version history shows current version and previous versions
Proposal detail - Inline editing (Click to add) visible for editable fields
Projects page - tile/list view toggle works
Projects page - list view has sortable columns with progress bars
Projects page - tile view shows completion percentage
Project detail - Add Task button present
Project detail - Tasks show subtask count (1 subtasks)
Project detail - Tasks have expand/collapse for subtasks
Project detail - Timer start button (Play icon) on each task
Project detail - Timer banner appears when timer running with Stop & Log button
Project detail - Timer stopped successfully with toast notification
Task detail dialog - Shows Priority, Assigned To, Description
Task detail dialog - Subtasks section with Add Subtask button
Task detail dialog - Comments section with Add Comment input
Task detail dialog - Under Review tasks show Approve & Continue, Return to Owner, Reject buttons
Return to Owner - Task status changes from Under Review to In Progress
Return to Owner - Comment added with review notes

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: HTML hydration warnings in list views due to dynamic content wrappers - cosmetic issue only
Google Drive, Gmail, and Zoho Sign integrations are MOCKED - running in demo mode
seed_data_creation: Created test proposals, projects, tasks, subtasks, and a task under review for testing all features.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v3 enhancements working: 1) Proposal versioning with auto-save on edit, History dialog, and Restore functionality. 2) Tile/List view toggle on Proposals and Projects pages with sortable columns. 3) Timer start/stop per task with banner and time logging. 4) Subtasks system with nesting and expand/collapse. 5) Comment edit/delete working. 6) Reviewer actions (Approve, Return to Owner, Reject) visible and functional on under_review tasks.

mocked_integrations.note: Google Drive, Gmail, Zoho Sign are in DEMO MODE - placeholder implementations

proposal_versioning.auto_save_on_edit: WORKING - version increments on content change
proposal_versioning.view_version_history: WORKING - History button shows dialog with all versions
proposal_versioning.restore_previous_version: WORKING - API tested, creates new version from old content

view_toggle.proposals_tile_list: WORKING - toggle between views preserved in localStorage
view_toggle.projects_tile_list: WORKING - list view shows progress bars, sortable columns
view_toggle.sortable_columns: WORKING - click header to sort asc/desc

timer.start_timer: WORKING - one timer per user enforced
timer.active_timer_banner: WORKING - shows task name and elapsed time

subtasks.show_subtask_count: WORKING - shows (X subtasks) in task list

reviewer_actions.return_to_owner: WORKING - changes status to in_progress, adds system comment
